sections.heading: Preamble
sections.text:
Appropriation [No.5 of2005 17
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 5 of 2005
Date of Assent: 1st April, 2005
An Act to authorise expenditure from the general revenues
of the Republic of moneys required for the services of
the Republic during the financial year ending on the 31st
December, 2005, not exceeding in the aggregate nine
trillion, seven hundred and seventy-nine billion and twenty
five million, three hundred and seventy thousand, four
hundred and thirteen kwacha.
[lstApril, 2005
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia Enactment

sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 2005. Short title
sections.text:
1. This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 2005. Short title
2. (I) On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, Application
there may be expended from the general revenues of the Republic.
such monies, not exceeding in the aggregate nine trillion, seven
hundred and seventy-nine billion and twenty five million, three
hundred and seventyt housand, four hundred and thirteen kwacha,
as may be required for the services of the Republic during the
financial year ending on the 31st December, 2005.
(2) The monies referred to in subsection(!) shall be appropriated
to the services of the Republic specified in the second column of
the Schedule in amounts not exceeding the amounts indicated in
the Third Column o�the Schedule.
(3) On the written authority of the Secretary to the Treasury,
Ministry of Finance and National Planning, the amounts shown
under the sub-heads of estimates may be varied:
Provided that-
the amount appropriated to each Head shall not thereby
(a)
be altered; and
the amount shown under Head 20 or 21 shall not be varied.
(b)
Single Copies oft his Act can be obtainedfi-o,,i lhe Government Printer,
P. 0. Box 30/36, 10/0/ Lusaka. Prke K4,000 each_
